sentences.arabic: تَتَجَذَّرُ فَلْسَفَةُ الكَرَمِ فِي الوِجْدَانِ العَرَبِيِّ بِوَصْفِهَا رُكْنًا مَكِينًا لَا يَنْفَصِمُ عَنْ كَيْنُونَةِ الفَرْدِ.
sentences.translation: Filozofija velikodušnosti duboko je ukorijenjena u arapskoj svijesti kao čvrst stub koji se ne može odvojiti od suštine pojedinca.
sentences.translationEn: The philosophy of generosity is deeply rooted in the Arab consciousness as a firm pillar inseparable from the essence of the individual.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ القِرَى يَوْمًا مُجَرَّدَ إِطْعَامٍ لِعَابِرِ سَبِيلٍ، بَلْ هُوَ طَقْسٌ أَنْطُولُوجِيٌّ يَعْكِسُ نُبْلَ السَّجِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo nikada nije bilo puko hranjenje putnika namjernika, već ontološki ritual koji odražava plemenitost naravi.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality was never merely about feeding a wayfarer; it is an ontological ritual reflecting nobility of character.

sentences.arabic: لَعَلَّ شَخْصِيَّةَ حَاتِمٍ الطَّائِيِّ، ذَلِكَ الرَّمْزُ السَّامِقُ، كَانَتْ تَجْسِيدًا لِهَذَا المِثَالِ الأَعْلَى لِلإِيثَارِ.
sentences.translation: Možda je lik Hatima al-Taija, tog uzvišenog simbola, bio utjelovljenje ovog ideala altruizma.
sentences.translationEn: Perhaps the figure of Hatim al-Tai, that towering symbol, was the embodiment of this ideal of altruism.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا المِثَالُ يَتَجَاوَزُ الشُّحَّ المَادِّيَّ لِيَبْلُغَ آفَاقَ التَّضْحِيَةِ المُطْلَقَةِ فِي قَلْبِ الصَّحْرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj ideal nadilazi materijalnu škrtost kako bi dosegao vidike apsolutne žrtve u srcu pustinje.
sentences.translationEn: This ideal transcends material stinginess to reach the horizons of absolute sacrifice in the heart of the desert.

sentences.arabic: بَيْتُ العَرَبِيِّ، سَوَاءٌ كَانَ خَيْمَةً أَمْ قَصْرًا، يَظَلُّ مَشْرَعَ الأَبْوَابِ لِكُلِّ طَارِقٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kuća, bilo da je šator ili palata, ostaje širom otvorenih vrata za svakog namjernika.
sentences.translationEn: An Arab home, whether a tent or a palace, remains wide open for every knocker.

sentences.arabic: يُسْتَقْبَلُ الضَّيْفُ بِحَفَاوَةٍ بَالِغَةٍ تَمْزِجُ بَيْنَ بَشَاشَةِ الوَجْهِ وَسَخَاءِ اليَدِ المِعْطَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Gost se dočekuje s izuzetnom srdačnošću koja spaja vedrinu lica i darežljivost ruke.
sentences.translationEn: A guest is received with immense warmth that blends a cheerful countenance with a generous hand.

sentences.arabic: يُؤَصِّلُ ذَلِكَ لِعَلَاقَةٍ جَدَلِيَّةٍ بَيْنَ المُضِيفِ وَالزَّائِرِ تَقُومُ عَلَى الِاحْتِرَامِ وَالتَّقْدِيرِ.
sentences.translation: To utemeljuje dijalektički odnos između domaćina i posjetioca zasnovan na poštovanju i uvažavanju.
sentences.translationEn: This establishes a dialectical relationship between host and visitor based on respect and appreciation.

sentences.arabic: فِي العَصْرِ الحَدِيثِ، رَغْمَ صَخَبِ العَوْلَمَةِ، لَا تَزَالُ هَذِهِ القِيَمُ تُمَثِّلُ عِمَادَ المُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: U modernom dobu, uprkos buci globalizacije, ove vrijednosti i dalje predstavljaju stub društva.
sentences.translationEn: In the modern era, despite the clamor of globalization, these values still represent the backbone of society.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ التَّقْصِيرُ فِي حَقِّ الضَّيْفِ نَقِيصَةً كُبْرَى تُعَيَّرُ بِهَا النُّفُوسُ الأَبِيَّةُ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Zanemarivanje prava gosta smatra se velikim nedostatkom koji sramoti ponosne duše.
sentences.translationEn: Falling short in a guest's rights is considered a major flaw that shames proud souls.

sentences.arabic: القَهْوَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ، بِرَائِحَةِ هَيْلِهَا الفَوَّاحَةِ، هِيَ رِسَالَةُ تَرْحِيبٍ صَامِتَةٍ وَعَمِيقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa, sa svojim mirisnim kardamomom, tiha je i duboka poruka dobrodošlice.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee, with its fragrant aroma of cardamom, is a silent and profound message of welcome.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تُعْلِنُ عَنِ الأُلْفَةِ وَتُجَدِّدُ العَهْدَ مَعَ مِيرَاثٍ تَلِيدٍ لَا يَعْرِفُ الفَنَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Ona objavljuje bliskost i obnavlja zavjet s drevnim naslijeđem koje ne poznaje nestajanje.
sentences.translationEn: It announces intimacy and renews the bond with an ancient heritage that knows no end.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهَا مَنْظُومَةٌ أَخْلَاقِيَّةٌ تَرْتَقِي بِمَفْهُومِ الضِّيَافَةِ إِلَى مَرْتَبَةِ القَدَاسَةِ الرُّوحِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: To je moralni sistem koji uzdiže koncept gostoprimstva do ranga duhovne svetosti.
sentences.translationEn: It is a moral system that elevates the concept of hospitality to the rank of spiritual sanctity.

sentences.arabic: تُضْفِي هَذِهِ التَّقَالِيدُ عَلَى الحَيَاةِ اليَوْمِيَّةِ مَعْنًى يَتَجَاوَزُ المَادِّيَّاتِ الزَّائِلَةَ بِاسْتِمْرَارٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove tradicije svakodnevnom životu daju smisao koji stalno nadilazi prolazne materijalne stvari.
sentences.translationEn: These traditions bestow upon daily life a meaning that continuously transcends fleeting material concerns.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا يَبْقَى الكَرَمُ هُوِيَّةً حَيَّةً تَنْبِضُ فِي عُرُوقِ الأَجْيَالِ المُتَعَاقِبَةِ مَهْمَا اخْتَلَفَ الزَّمانُ.
sentences.translation: Tako velikodušnost ostaje živ identitet koji pulsira u venama generacija bez obzira na protok vremena.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, generosity remains a living identity pulsing through the veins of successive generations, regardless of the changing times.
